final_reasoning: The image shows a rural two-lane road with a dashed white center line and solid white edge lines. The overcast sky and the style of the utility poles (wooden poles with overhead lines) are common in Eastern and Central Europe. There are no visible license plates, flags, or signs to provide immediate linguistic clues, but the overall geography and infrastructure are highly characteristic of the Czech Republic or Poland. Based on the specific road layout and the surrounding forest topography, this is located in the Czech Republic.
